name: @drewpayment/mink
description: A hidden presence that moves alongside the developer — token efficiency and cross-project wiki for AI coding assistants

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --format esm && node -e "const f=require('fs');let c=f.readFileSync('dist/cli.js','utf8');c=c.replace(/^#!.*\n/,'');f.writeFileSync('dist/cli.js','#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);f.chmodSync('dist/cli.js',0o755)"
